aggregation_contract.entity_metrics: summarize within paper before corpus aggregation; pooled entity distributions are secondary and non-independent
aggregation_contract.independent_unit: paper (one main-article document); supplements are a separate descriptive stratum
aggregation_contract.partition_comparison_gate: both partitions require valid_n >= 5 for effect comparison; otherwise emit side_by_side_case_set

sample_size_label.interpretation: The label summarizes valid_n; it never upgrades a requested mode, proves comparability, or determines whether a conclusion is sufficient for a writing surface.

annotation_acceptance.accepted_integrity: resolution=accepted requires a matching source_sha256 or object_fingerprint
annotation_acceptance.candidate_rule: candidate annotations remain visible but never enter accepted-role aggregates
annotation_acceptance.metric_isolation: annotations never mutate deterministic or heuristic metric values
annotation_acceptance.stale_rule: hash/fingerprint mismatch is diagnosed as stale and excluded

design_translation_contract.hard_constraint_rule: only manifest official_constraints with contained existing source artifacts may produce hard_constraint entries

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing a branch surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing an initialization surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing an explicit Input surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.numerator: algorithms with explicit Input surface marker
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Non-empty line count for each explicit algorithm object.
metrics.numerator: non-empty lines in an explicit algorithm or pseudocode object
metrics.paper_reduction: within-paper median; raw integer entity observations remain in entity_values
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing a loop surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Document-level sum of six adapter-derived algorithm-object feature presences: Input, Output, initialization, loop, branch, and return. It is not a count of Algorithm/Pseudocode words and not semantic algorithm identification.
metrics.eligibility: at least one explicitly parsed algorithm object from a structured adapter
metrics.implementation_method: adapter feature flags are reduced to booleans per algorithm object and summed across the document
metrics.numerator: Input/Output/initialization/loop/branch/return feature-presence flags across explicitly parsed algorithm objects
metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only when a structured adapter can confirm no recognized feature flag across parsed algorithm objects

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing an explicit Output surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.numerator: algorithms with explicit Output surface marker
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Algorithms containing a return surface marker.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Count of explicit algorithm or pseudocode callouts.
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Count of explicit equation callouts.
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Resolved explicit figure/table/equation/algorithm callouts.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Count of explicit figure callouts.
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Explicit objects without any resolved textual callout.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.numerator: explicit objects with zero resolved callouts
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Count of explicit table callouts.
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Document-level count of panel-label surface-pattern events such as (a) across explicit figure captions. It does not infer visual panels.
metrics.denominator: explicit figure objects in the document
metrics.eligibility: at least one explicitly parsed figure object from a structured adapter
metrics.implementation_method: versioned panel-label regex events are counted within each explicit figure caption and summed across the document
metrics.numerator: panel-label regex match events across explicit figure captions
metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only when a structured adapter can inspect all parsed figure captions and finds no matching event

metrics.definition: Per-figure vector of sentence-boundary proxy counts for explicit figure captions; not a linguistic sentence judgment.
metrics.eligibility: an explicit figure caption is available
metrics.implementation_method: versioned punctuation-based sentence splitter applied independently to each explicit caption
metrics.numerator: versioned sentence-boundary proxies in figure caption
metrics.paper_reduction: within-paper median; raw integer entity observations remain in entity_values
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Document-level count of uncertainty surface-marker events across explicit figure captions. It does not assess statistical or visual adequacy.
metrics.denominator: explicit figure objects in the document
metrics.eligibility: at least one explicitly parsed figure object from a structured adapter
metrics.implementation_method: versioned uncertainty regex events are counted within each explicit caption and summed across the document
metrics.numerator: uncertainty-marker regex match events across explicit captions
metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only when a structured adapter can inspect all parsed figure captions or notes and finds no matching event

metrics.definition: Word count of each explicit figure caption.
metrics.numerator: versioned Unicode word tokens in explicit figure caption
metrics.paper_reduction: within-paper median; raw integer entity observations remain in entity_values
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Explicit objects whose caption is absent in the supported source.
metrics.eligibility: source region and adapter capability are available
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Per-table vector of sentence-boundary proxy counts for explicit table captions; not a linguistic sentence judgment.

metrics.implementation_method: versioned punctuation-based sentence splitter applied independently to each explicit caption
metrics.numerator: versioned sentence-boundary proxies in table caption
metrics.paper_reduction: within-paper median; raw integer entity observations remain in entity_values
metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Document-level count of uncertainty surface-marker events across explicit table captions. It does not assess statistical or visual adequacy.

metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only when a structured adapter can inspect all parsed table captions or notes and finds no matching event

metrics.definition: Word count of each explicit table caption.
metrics.numerator: versioned Unicode word tokens in explicit table caption

metrics.zero_semantics: valid zero only when the adapter can confirm absence

metrics.definition: Count of distinct URL/URI surfaces within parsed paragraphs that contain an English code/repository/GitHub context marker. Every distinct link in a qualifying paragraph is counted; targets are not fetched or verified.
metrics.eligibility: English normalized body text containing a detectable URL/URI surface is available
metrics.implementation_method: deduplicate explicit URL/URI surfaces within each parsed paragraph, test the whole paragraph for versioned code/repository/GitHub markers, and count every link in qualifying paragraphs without network access
metrics.numerator: distinct URL/URI surfaces in parsed paragraphs containing an English code|repository|github context marker
metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only for eligible English body text after paragraph-level URL/URI and context matching runs

metrics.definition: Count of distinct URL/URI surfaces within parsed paragraphs that contain an English data/dataset availability or release context marker. Every distinct link in a qualifying paragraph is counted; targets are not fetched or verified.
metrics.eligibility: English normalized body text containing a detectable URL/URI surface is available
metrics.implementation_method: deduplicate explicit URL/URI surfaces within each parsed paragraph, test the whole paragraph for versioned data/dataset availability or release markers, and count every link in qualifying paragraphs without network access
metrics.numerator: distinct URL/URI surfaces in parsed paragraphs containing an English data|dataset availability/release context marker
metrics.zero_semantics: zero is valid only for eligible English body text after paragraph-level URL/URI and context matching runs

missingness.excluded: region or document is excluded by policy
missingness.not_applicable: metric is inapplicable to this source or object
missingness.not_present: supported and complete source confirms a valid zero
missingness.source_missing: source does not contain the required region
missingness.unsupported_format: adapter cannot recover the required structure

tokenizer.definition: Latin/alphanumeric runs may contain internal apostrophe or hyphen; each Han, Hiragana, Katakana, or Hangul codepoint is one word unit; punctuation and markup are excluded.

tokenizer_profile.definition: Latin/alphanumeric runs may contain internal apostrophe or hyphen; each Han, Hiragana, Katakana, or Hangul codepoint is one word unit; punctuation and markup are excluded.
